TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: magal ina gaga na bnkis tayal raral ka, cingay squliq musa magal ina ga pqasun na lpiyung .
S.PHON: maɣal ina ɣaɣa na βnkis~ɕ tajal raral ka, ʦ~ʨiŋaj s~ɕquliq mus~ɕa maɣal ina ɣa pqas~ɕun na lpijuŋ .
S.FORM: magal ina gaga na bnkis tayal raral ka, cingay squliq musa magal ina ga pqasun na lpiyung .
S.PHON: maɣal ina ɣaɣa na βnkis~ɕ tajal raral ka, ʦ~ʨiŋaj s~ɕquliq mus~ɕa maɣal ina ɣa pqas~ɕun na lpijuŋ .
